title: Everbuild Plumbers Gold | Excellent Primerless Adhesion with Mould Shield Silicone Sealant - Can be Applied to Wet Surface and Under Water - Clear - 290 ml (Pack of 2)
features: The information below applies to each unit in the pack

STP polymer technology that offers outstanding adhesion to sanitary, bathroom, wetroom, kitchen and plumbing materials such as hard plastics, acrylics, fiberglass, ceramics,glass, marble, granite, aluminum, mirrors, metals etc.

Excellent primer has less adhesion to most common bathroom substrates including metals, plastics such as polyester, perspex, glass, concrete, plaster, plasterboard, wood, enamel, painted surfaces, etc.
High bonding strength, yet flexible enough to cope with common sealing applications. Interior and exterior use are also Waterproof & weatherproof.
Can be applied to wet surfaces and underwater. Powerful anti-fungal action prevents mold growth on sealant – tested for 5 years (accelerated aging). Permanently flexible - 20% movement accommodation.
Resistant to chemicals & petrol (10% dilute acids/alkalis, most solvents). Excellent primerless adhesion to most surfaces. Sealing soil and vent pipes.
description: From the manufacturer HOW TO APPLY? Ensure surfaces are clean. Cut cartridge tip carefully, attach nozzle, trim to width, and apply with a standard sealant gun. As Adhesive: Clean surfaces, prime dusty areas with PVA Bond, then apply adhesive around edges and at intervals for heavy items. As Sealant : Ensure joint width is twice depth, use masking tape, and tool within 15 mins for a smooth, proper seal. Fix Mirrors : Apply 6mm vertical sealant beads 30-40mm apart, press evenly, and support with tape until adhesive cures (24-48 hrs). WHERE TO US IT?
